creator: feld@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Danilo Egea Gondolfo from comment #10)

With the patch applied and your dtrace command I have seen results like this:

        2             5869
        7             5968
        3             6077
        6             6677
        9             6854
        5             7180
       10             7221
        0             7232
        1             7919
       11             8171
        8            10777
        4            32122
